name: Enchilada Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the ground beef and chopped onion in a skillet until no longer pink. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
2. Add the cream of mushroom soup, cream of chicken soup, green chilies, enchilada sauce, and milk to the skillet. Stir until combined.
3. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
4. Line a 9x13 inch pan with six soft tortillas, overlapping slightly.
5. Spread half of the meat mixture evenly over the tortillas.
6. Sprinkle half of the grated Cheddar and Monterey Jack cheeses on top.
7. Repeat layers with remaining ingredients.
8. Cover the dish and bake for 40 minutes.
9. Allow to cool slightly before cutting into squares.
10. Serve each square topped with a dab of sour cream.
Serves 8.
